name: 2'4"x7' Handloom Diamond Runner Rug Blue - Threshold™: Indoor Low Pile, Cotton & Jute, Entryway or Kitchen Use
description:
Instantly update your indoor space with this Handloom Diamond Runner Rug from Threshold™. This handmade runner rug features a handloom diamond pattern with tasseled edges for eye-catching style, making it a perfect accent piece for any room. The woven construction offers soft underfoot comfort, and the low-pile height makes it easy to clean. It's ideal for placement in even the highest-traffic areas of your home.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
